name: @tank/systematic-debugging
description: Systematic debugging methodology for isolating and fixing software defects. Covers hypothesis-driven investigation (observe, hypothesize, test), binary search isolation, the 3-Strike Error Protocol, log analysis, state inspection, and regression prevention. Synthesized from Debugging (Agans), Why Programs Fail (Zeller). Triggers: debug, debugging, bug, error, fix, root cause, stack trace, breakpoint, log, isolate, reproduce, regression, hypothesis, bisect, investigation, troubleshoot.
